zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Prince III於1550年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯時，他的父親Thomas Prince Jr20歲，母親Dorothy Parsons18歲。他於1569年與Nancy E Phelps在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: nickname from Middle English, Old French prince (from Latin princeps).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Prinz ‘prince’, or its Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or some other Slavic cognate Princ, from princ ‘prince’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Primc: status name for one who lives in the house of his father-in-law, from a derivative of primiti ‘to accept, to take over’.

variants.name: Prinz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Ulrich, Arno, Friedrich, Hans, Klaus, Mechthild.

German: nickname from Middle High German prinze ‘prince’, presumably denoting someone who behaved in a regal manner or who had won the title in some contest of skill. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Prince III was born in 1550, in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Prince Jr, was 20 and his mother, Dorothy Parsons, was 18. He married Nancy E Phelps in 1569, in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Prince III est né en 1550, à Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Prince Jr, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Parsons, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Nancy E Phelps en 1569, à Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Prince IIIが1550年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父Thomas Prince Jrは20歳，母Dorothy Parsonsは18歳であった。1569年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスでNancy E Phelpsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Prince III(이)가 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Prince Jr(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Parsons(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 Nancy E Phelps(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Prince III родился в 1550 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Prince Jr было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Parsons, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Nancy E Phelps в 1569 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
